meaning: 布干达[乌干达中南部一地区]
examples: The battle with Buganda will remain the epicentre of opposition to an extension of his rule, but other factors add to his troubles.
A man has turned himself in to Ugandan police and confessed to setting fire to five royal tombs of the traditional Buganda Kings earlier this month.
The Buganda kingdom, the largest of the country's four big ones, helped vote Mr Museveni, an Ankole, into office.
The property, an outstanding example of an architectural style developed by the Buganda Kingdom since the 13th century, will be reconstructed.
The Buganda people have musical signatures for each of their 52 clans.
